[[Yeoman/Legends|Yeoman]] '''Marcopius''' was one of [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo's]] [[New Republic Honor Guard|Honor Guard]] and a graduate of the [[New Republic Fleet Academy]]. Although not initially killed by the [[Death Seed]] plague, he survived long enough to take a small lifeboat off of the [[Borealis (cruiser)|''Borealis'']] with the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] and into hyperspace, where he died. His body was later unceremoniously dumped out of an airlock by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Bortrek]] of the [[Pure Sabacc (starship)|''Pure Sabacc'']].

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Planet of Twilight (abridged audiobook)|''Planet of Twilight'' abridged audiobook]]
